rationale: 8 names, 7 tradeable + SAIL avoid. All tradeable names on bias:both per #lesson 2026-W19 (pre-market directional bias contradicted 3/4 intraday tapes in W19). BHARTIARTL highest conviction (5G launch + Jefferies upgrade + mkt-cap milestone). ITC and INFY at conviction 3 on fresh catalysts. Recheck regime at 09:45 IST — if NIFTY within 0.3% of 23,618 by then, RANGING-flat confirmed, require strict 2+ confirmation.
lessons_applied: #lesson 2026-W19 default-both bias when intraday direction unclear
